response.justification: Candidate has 10+ years of full-stack experience well exceeding the 6+ year requirement, with recent hands-on work in TypeScript, Node.js, React, and MongoDB at Optilyz and re:cinq. Current role explicitly involves AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling, directly matching a key requirement. Strong polyglot background (TS, Java, DLang, Python-adjacent) and demonstrated craftsmanship via TDD, CI/CD, and community teaching. Gaps include no explicit Nest.js or Vitest mention and limited PostgreSQL exposure, but these are learnable given the deep fundamentals.
strengths: 10+ years full-stack experience with TypeScript, Node.js, React, MongoDB, AWS, Docker, Kubernetes
Active AI-agent and MCP infrastructure work at current role directly matches requirement
Strong engineering craftsmanship: TDD, pairing, trunk-based dev, code katas, public talks
concerns: No explicit Nest.js framework experience listed in stack
Vitest not mentioned; testing experience appears to lean on D-language tooling and Selenium
PostgreSQL/relational DB depth unclear — primary DB experience is MongoDB and MySQL
